name: Failed Login Attempts to Critical Assets
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.


SIGMA Title: Failed Login Attempts to Critical Machine
SIGMA Description: Detects multiple failed login attempts which may indicate a brute-force attack or probing.

False positives:
- User mistypes
- Expired credentials

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4625 AQL filter query

when the event(s) were detected by one or more of WindowsAuthServer @ H360-DC2, WindowsAuthServer @ H360-DC3, WindowsAuthServer @ H360-TALLY, WindowsAuthServer @ H360FS, WindowsAuthServer @ SRV-APP-H360
TD_list: APPLY Failed Login Attempts to Critical Assets on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4625 AQL filter query

AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of WindowsAuthServer @ H360-DC2, WindowsAuthServer @ H360-DC3, WindowsAuthServer @ H360-TALLY, WindowsAuthServer @ H360FS, WindowsAuthServer @ SRV-APP-H360
RED_list: Event name: Failed Login Attempts to Critical Machine
